rulings.Case Title: DAMIEN QUINN VS. BELLROSE, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Apr 03, 2020 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT ANDREW CHIU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to July 10, 2020 per March 24, 2020 Order of the Presiding Judge. All motions currently calendared for March 21, 2020 in this action are also continued to July 10, 2020. If parties stipulate to a different hearing date after July 10, 2020, parties may notify the Court at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org by 8:00 a.m. on April 3, 2020. No appearance required. Please be advised that this e-mail address is not regularly monitored and no other communications with the Court are allowed via this e-mail.= (501/CFH)
